title: Beezy's Enhanced Endermen
body:
![Beezy's Enhanced Endermen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JxadrBWu/images/d01e723611c304f89617f3a0abb3352a7ae66453.png)

**Beezy's Enhanced Endermen is a Enderman overhaul that aims to redesign the Endermen to a more cat-like appearance with fluffy animated tails, variated horns, jewelry, and fur.**

For Versions ???-1.21 [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) required. **Optifine** can be used, but it is not recommended. Eye colors will not variate with *Optifine.* Sorry!
##
## Current Skin Variations
Black, Purple, White, Gray, Pale, Brown, Orange, Calico Variations, Tuxedo Variations, Ranboo
#

There is 
11 different horn variations
21 different eye variations with varying rarity.
133 different jewelry variations

[RENAMING TUTORIAL](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-vKxNo10bNedjo0aPo3vjqg9VeRkkQfeYKmJueHUkqY/edit?usp=sharing)

#
**Credits:**
Horns made by jimmyhelp from the Figura Discord

Tail animation made by [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben)

Eye of Ender texture made by [Luigra](https://www.tumblr.com/luigra)

-- Feel free to use in any modpacks! 
If you would like to ask for support, or share/talk about ideas, you can join [My Discord](https://discord.gg/bubkyCcwsm).
